Loader also have no protection, giving us access to his source and comments from chatgpt inside the source. Evidence: https://imgur.com/a/23ONcGs

Windows.About: Initially launching as Swift, this executor has navigated a series of identity shifts, moving to Bunni and briefly rebranding as Visual before eventually returning to its current name. It serves as a streamlined environment for running custom scripts, prioritizing a stable and accessible experience over more bloated alternatives. By focusing on consistent performance and a reliable execution framework, it provides a straightforward way for users to inject and manage their scripts without unnecessary complexity.

Windows.Note: Known for exit-scamming multiple cheats and distributing RATs. Recently exposed for using AI to develop an external cheat, which may include malicious components. Evidence: https://imgur.com/a/chocola-ai-made-external-w-possible-virus-6UbizZV and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FGMn9gfdkOs

Windows.About:
**Cosmic** is a paid Windows executor priced at <"$20"> for a lifetime subscription. It includes the following features:

- 100% sUNC
- Multi-instance support
- Minimalistic UI

:::note "Keep in mind"
Although **Cosmic** has a reputable developer, it is still a brand-new product and may experience downtime in the future.
:::

:::pros
- Fast support
- <"$20"> lifetime product
- Custom UI support

:::neutral
- Brand-new product

:::cons
- Has had a few long downtime periods
:::

**Isaeva** is a <"$5"> Windows executor. It includes the following features:

- 100% sUNC
- Fast, lightweight injection
- Clean, overhauled UI with no ads or clutter
- Account manager and more

:::note "Keep in mind"
The developers of **Isaeva** are from Nihon and are reputable. However, one of the lead developers, **LXZP**, recently left the team, which has caused extended downtime.
:::

:::pros
- Clean, minimal UI with no ads or unnecessary menus
- High script compatibility
- Fast injection process
- Many unique features, including an account manager and a server browser
- Unlimited multiple instance count
:::

:::cons
- Extended downtime due to a lead developer leaving the team (uncertain return)
:::

Caution.Reason: Deal with caution as the lead developer of this cheat recently left the team

**Madium** is a <"free"> Windows executor. It includes the following features:

- 98% sUNC
- Fast, lightweight injection
- Clean, overhauled UI with no ads or clutter

:::note "Keep in mind"
**LXZP**, part of the development team, has a questionable history. However, community feedback is very positive overall despite this.
:::

:::pros
- Completely free with no paywalled features
- Clean, minimal UI with no ads or unnecessary menus
- High script compatibility
- Fast injection process
- Strong community sentiment and active development

:::neutral
- Limited UI customization (no custom themes, resizable or persistent window, etc.)

:::cons
- Crashes and DLL disconnections are the most common issues, occurring on attach, post-inject, during server hops, and mid-session
- Auto-execute can be unreliable (single script execution or failing to trigger)
- Injection may hang or cause immediate post-inject crashes
- Multi-instance injection becomes unstable at 5+ simultaneous instances
- Performance on low-end hardware is not optimal
:::

Issues.Reason: This product is having issues with stability

Windows.About:
**Matcha** is a premium external priced at <"$12"> for a lifetime subscription, with the following features:

- LuaVM with many custom functions  
- Fast and easy setup process 
- Modern, easy-to-navigate menu  
- Many different unique features (e.g., raycast silent aim, server-sided desync)

:::note "Read before use"
Some unique features (e.g., server-sided desync, raycast silent aim) are locked behind an additional paywall.
:::

:::pros
- Lifetime product  
- Reliable; one of the longest-running exploits currently available  
- Good LuaVM with a variety of scripts created by the community  
- Fast update times    

:::neutral
:::

:::cons
- ESP can be laggy on different PCs, regardless of performance level  
- Some unique features (e.g., server-sided desync, raycast silent aim) are locked behind an additional paywall  
:::

**Potassium** is a premium exploit priced at <"$22.99"> for a lifetime subscription, with the following features:

- 100% sUNC
- Multiple instance support
- Non-bloated UI

:::note "Keep in mind"
While **Potassium** offers a product at a very low price, **Potassium** is known for not having a good support team. Do not expect reliable help from them.
:::

:::pros
- <"$22.99"> lifetime product
- Unlimited multiple instance count
- Reliable; one of the longest-running executors currently available

:::cons
- Poor stability during long sessions
- Slow updates
- Kernel-level injection (can cause BSODs from time to time)
:::

Windows.AccessDescription: May perform internal modifications when some features are enabled

Windows.About: Seliware is a low-cost premium exploit that has become popular among budget users. Priced at $3.99 per week, it's one of the cheapest paid options available. It updates relatively quickly, It sits at around 98% SUNC, and its client-modification bypass works reliably, making it solid value for a paid exploit.

**Serotonin** is a premium external priced at <"$10"> for a monthly subscription, with the following features:

- LuaVM with many custom functions  
- Modern, easy-to-navigate menu  
- Easy to set up and use  

:::note "Fun facts"
Serotonin was one of the first to add many features (e.g., mesh chams, terrain wallcheck, server-sided desync).
:::

:::pros
- Reliable; one of the longest-running exploits currently available  
- Good LuaVM with a variety of scripts created by the community  
- Fast update times  
- Many different unique features (e.g., terrain modification, server-sided desync, full wallcheck support)  

:::neutral
- Subscription-based cheat

**Severe** is a premium external priced at <"$20"> for a lifetime subscription, with the following features:

- LuaVM with many custom functions
- Server-sided desync
- Unique ESP style

:::note "Keep in mind"
**Severe**'s user interface can be complicated to navigate for some users.
:::

:::pros
- Lifetime product
- Reliable; the longest-running exploit currently available
- Great LuaVM
- Great optimizations
:::

:::cons
- Long update times
- Bloated UI, which can be difficult to navigate
:::

Solara has built a reputation as a dependable executor by prioritizing a stable user experience with very few technical hiccups or crashes. Its development cycle is notably aggressive, featuring rapid-fire updates that quickly address Roblox patches to ensure that downtime remains at an absolute minimum. Because it consistently stays ahead of platform security changes, it serves as a go-to choice for those who value a seamless and reliable scripting environment.

**Synapse Z** is a paid Windows executor priced at <"$4"> per week. It includes the following features:

- Hyperion emulation
- 97% sUNC
- Multiple instance support

:::note "Keep in mind"
**Synapse Z** had a long downtime period, and similar issues may occur again in the future.
:::

:::pros
- Fast updates when Roblox updates
- Unlimited multiple instance support
- Custom UI support

:::neutral
- No official external UI; only an internal UI is available

:::cons
- Many bugs may occur due to it being in beta
:::

Issues.Reason: This product is currently in public beta, so  bugs may occur

Windows.About: Volcano is a versatile executor designed for power users who need to manage several accounts simultaneously through its built-in multi-instance support. Beyond account management, it features an integrated decompiler that allows users to analyze and view client-side scripts directly within the game environment. While these utilities provide a solid foundation for scripting and debugging, the current market offers several competitors that provide similar or more advanced functionality at a more competitive price point.

**Volt**, formerly known as **AWP.GG**, is a paid Windows executor priced at <"$5.99"> per week. It includes the following features:

- Hyperion emulation
- 98% sUNC (missing a decompiler; you need to add one manually. Recommended options include [Medal Decompiler](https://github.com/Stefanuk12/medal-decompiler) or [Oracle Decompiler](https://cheatsmarket.com/product/oracle-decompiler-month?ref=vanity))
- Multiple instance support (different **Volt** tiers allow higher or lower instance limits)
- VSC-based UI with many unique features

:::note "Keep in mind"
While under the **AWP.GG** name, this cheat had a long downtime period. After rebranding (and possibly switching developers), all existing users were compensated, and it has been reliably updating ever since.
:::

:::pros
- Fast updates when **Roblox** updates
- Optimized multiple instance support
- Many unique features, including a stream-proof drawing library

:::cons
- Multiple instance limits are capped and require higher-tier plans to increase the number of simultaneous accounts
:::
